results.question: 从2024年xx月到2024年xx月，Yoga Pro 9 Gen 90 MiniLED Touch 和 Non Touch 的出货数量以及比例是什么？

ner.original_text: 从2024年xx月到2024年xx月，Yoga Pro 9 Gen 90 MiniLED Touch 和 Non Touch 的出货数量以及比例是什么？

sql.sql:
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN PRODUCT_NAME LIKE '%Touch%' THEN 'Touch'
        ELSE 'Non-Touch'
    END AS Screen_Type,
    SUM(Volume) AS Total_Volume,
    ROUND(SUM(Volume) * 100.0 / (SELECT SUM(Volume) FROM statshipmentboxai WHERE PRODUCT_NAME = 'Yoga Pro 9 Gen 90' AND ((Year = 2024 AND Month >= ?) OR (Year = 2024 AND Month <= ?))), 2) AS Mix_Percentage
FROM statshipmentboxai
WHERE PRODUCT_NAME = 'Yoga Pro 9 Gen 90'
    AND ((Year = 2024 AND Month >= ?) OR (Year = 2024 AND Month <= ?))
GROUP BY 
    CASE 
        WHEN PRODUCT_NAME LIKE '%Touch%' THEN 'Touch'
        ELSE 'Non-Touch'
    END;

ner.original_text: 从2024年xx月到2024年xx月，Yoga Pro 9 Gen 90 UMA 的出货量以及在总出货量的占比是多少？

sql.sql:
SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN PRODUCT_NAME = 'Yoga Pro 9 Gen 90' AND GPU_TYPE = 'UMA' THEN Volume ELSE 0 END) AS `Yoga Pro 9 Gen 90 UMA 出货量`,
    SUM(Volume) AS `总出货量`,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN PRODUCT_NAME = 'Yoga Pro 9 Gen 90' AND GPU_TYPE = 'UMA' THEN Volume ELSE 0 END) / SUM(Volume) * 100, 2) AS `占比(%)`
FROM shipment_data.statshipmentboxai
WHERE ((Year = 2024 AND Month >= ?) OR (Year = 2024 AND Month <= ?))

results.question: FY23出货的Intel/AMD/Qualcomm的占比情况？

ner.original_text: FY23出货的Intel/AMD/Qualcomm的占比情况？

sql.sql:
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN CPU_VENDOR = 'Intel' THEN 'Intel'
        WHEN CPU_VENDOR = 'AMD' THEN 'AMD'
        WHEN CPU_VENDOR = 'Qualcomm' THEN 'Qualcomm'
        ELSE 'Other'
    END AS CPU_Platform,
    SUM(Volume) AS Total_Volume,
    ROUND(SUM(Volume) * 100.0 / (SELECT SUM(Volume) FROM statshipmentboxai WHERE FiscalYear = 2023), 2) AS Percentage
FROM statshipmentboxai
WHERE FiscalYear = 2023
    AND CPU_VENDOR IN ('Intel', 'AMD', 'Qualcomm')
GROUP BY CPU_Platform
ORDER BY Total_Volume DESC;

results.question: Yoga C 产品G70-G90 SS 1Q-2Q的出货及在当季度的vol mix by GEN

ner.original_text: Yoga C 产品G70-G90 SS 1Q-2Q的出货及在当季度的vol mix by GEN

sql.sql:
SELECT 
    PRODUCT_GEN,
    Quarter,
    Year,
    SUM(Volume) AS total_volume,
    SUM(Volume) * 100.0 / SUM(SUM(Volume)) OVER (PARTITION BY Quarter, Year) AS vol_mix_percentage
FROM shipment_data.statshipmentboxai
WHERE 
    PRODUCT_BRAND = 'Yoga'
    AND PRODUCT_CATEGORYSUB = 'Convertible'
    AND PRODUCT_GEN IN ('70', '80', '90')
    AND Quarter IN (1, 2)
    AND Year IN (2023, 2024)
GROUP BY 
    PRODUCT_GEN,
    Quarter,
    Year
ORDER BY 
    Year,
    Quarter,
    PRODUCT_GEN;

sql.sql:

    GEO,
    SUM(Volume) AS total_volume,
    ROUND(SUM(Volume) * 100.0 / (SELECT SUM(Volume) FROM statshipmentboxai WHERE PRODUCT_SERIES = 'IdeaPad Slim 3' AND FiscalYear = 2023), 2) AS mix_percentage
FROM statshipmentboxai
WHERE PRODUCT_SERIES = 'IdeaPad Slim 3' AND FiscalYear = 2023
GROUP BY GEO
ORDER BY total_volume DESC
LIMIT 1;

results.question: 2024年上半年 AMD，Intel 和高通分别出了多少？比例如何？年比年是否有变化

sql.sql:
SELECT 
    CPU_VENDOR,
    SUM(CASE WHEN Year = 2024 AND Month BETWEEN 1 AND 6 THEN Volume ELSE 0 END) AS `2024_H1_Volume`,
    SUM(CASE WHEN Year = 2023 AND Month BETWEEN 1 AND 6 THEN Volume ELSE 0 END) AS `2023_H1_Volume`,
    CASE 
        WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN Year = 2023 AND Month BETWEEN 1 AND 6 THEN Volume ELSE 0 END) > 0 
        THEN (SUM(CASE WHEN Year = 2024 AND Month BETWEEN 1 AND 6 THEN Volume ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN Year = 2023 AND Month BETWEEN 1 AND 6 THEN Volume ELSE 0 END)) * 100.0 / SUM(CASE WHEN Year = 2023 AND Month BETWEEN 1 AND 6 THEN Volume ELSE 0 END)
        ELSE NULL 
    END AS `YoY_Growth_%`

GROUP BY CPU_VENDOR
ORDER BY `2024_H1_Volume` DESC;
